payload.answer: Required eval accounting fields: (1) Token counts: input_tokens, output_tokens, total_tokens; (2) Provider/model: provider_id, model_id; (3) Estimated price: cost_input_per_1k_tokens, cost_output_per_1k_tokens, calculated_cost; (4) Latency: p50_latency_ms, p90_latency_ms, p95_latency_ms. Percentiles must maintain ordering p50 ≤ p90 ≤ p95.
payload.decision: Document core accounting fields as durable memory with high confidence; preserve ambiguity around provider-specific implementations

entity_resolution.reason: All entities are standard accounting fields; no conflicts detected

payload.intent: Explain required evaluation accounting fields for cost, latency, and token tracking in LLM observability

entities.name: total_tokens
entities.role: sum of input and output tokens

memory_cards.statement: Token accounting requires input_tokens, output_tokens, and total_tokens counts per request
Provider and model identification requires provider_id and model_id fields to disambiguate cost and capability
Estimated price requires cost_input_per_1k_tokens, cost_output_per_1k_tokens, and calculated_cost fields
Latency percentiles require p50_latency_ms, p90_latency_ms, p95_latency_ms fields for performance SLO tracking

repair_options: Add timestamp field to correlate accounting records with request lifecycle
Include request_id for traceability across distributed systems
Document provider rate card versioning to handle price changes
